item.title: About Me
item.description: Hi! I’m Emil Wåreus, a business savy data-nerd that spends way to much time in front of a screen. During business hours I work as the head of R&D/Data Science at Debricked, the startup I founded in 2018 and sold to Micro Focus in 2022. There I lead a small team of researchers in creating application security solutions to analyze open source. I’m also quite good at writing spaghetti code & drinking wine.
